description:
Instructions:
For the pregnant, the elderly and the disabled, it is dangerous and inconvenient to go to the toilet. This commode chair is perfect for people who is difficult to the toilet. This designed for the aforementioned people commode chair allows them to sit safely and replace toilet functions, which can solve the inconvenience of toilet problems. It is a good helper for the elderly and patients. This commode chair can be used as a commode chair, wheelchair and bath chair. Don't hesitate, just buy it!

Features:
1. Main frame produced by aluminum alloy. With a thickness of 1.4MM aluminum alloy, can bear 300lbs, waterproof and anti-mold
2. Portable backrest adopts imported PE, environmentally friendly and non-toxic, can effectively release back pressure
3. With massage turtle crack design, can promote blood pressure circulation
4. Memory foam cushion uses British non-toxic environmental protection fabrics, high rebound shape foam, waterproof and fireproof
5. Use galvanized steel plate to prevent corrosion, rust, high hardness and durable
6. Anti-slip handle, open seat cushion, PP anti-skid handrail and portable cover bucket
7. 4 wheels all have brakes, safe and stable
8. Feature retractable pedal design
9. Multi-function, can be used as a bath chair, wheelchair and commode chair



Specifications:
1. Material: Aluminum Alloy & Sponge Seat and Cover & Plastic
2. Color: White & Beige Cushion
3. Overall Dimensions: (16.34 x 21.46 x 36.02)" / (41.5 x 54.5 x 91.5)cm (D x W x H)
4. Cushion Width: 15.16" / 38.5cm
5. The Height from Seat to Floor: 19.29" / 49cm
6. The Height from Seat to Armrest: 7.09" / 18cm
7. The Height from Seat to Pedal: 12.2" / 31cm
8. Backrest Height: 6.89" / 17.5cm
9. Net Weight: 17.64 lbs / 8kg
10. Weight Capacity: 300 lbs
11. Suitable for: Elder People, Disabled People, Pregnant Women

Package Includes:
1 x Commode Chair
1 x Manual
